response.justification: Bogdan has strong backend and distributed-systems expertise, with demonstrated experience in event-driven platforms and real-time systems (e.g., GISCollective, Dunnhumby). However, his background lacks direct fintech or credit-risk experience, and while he has recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure (re:cinq), it is unclear if this meets the scale or complexity required for a CTO role in agentic AI fintech. Leadership experience is solid but not at the target scale (10 to 30+ engineers).
strengths: Proven expertise in event-driven architectures and real-time systems (e.g., GISCollective, Dunnhumby)
Recent hands-on experience with AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling (re:cinq)
Strong software craftsmanship with emphasis on testing, TDD, and CI/CD practices
concerns: No direct fintech, credit-risk, or financial-infrastructure experience
Limited leadership experience scaling teams to 30+ engineers
Minimal public evidence of operating multi-agent AI systems in production at fintech scale

key_factors.factor: Engineering leadership at scale (10+ to 30+ engineers)
